description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with two stories and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily clad in red brick, with a section of darker brick accenting one side of the lower level. Large rectangular windows are present on both floors, some with visible curtains, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper story slightly overhangs the lower level, creating a subtle architectural interest. The roof is flat and unadorned, emphasizing the contemporary style. There is no visible main entryway or door from any angle, suggesting it may be located on a side not shown or is minimally detailed.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, red brick exterior, and large rectangular windows, featuring a boxy, contemporary design.
description_view_0: This view shows the upper story with a large window and curtains, and the lower story with a smaller window; the darker brick accent is visible on the right.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the flat roof, red brick facade, and a single small window on the lower level; the darker brick accent is partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: This angle displays two large windows, one on each story, and a clear view of the overhanging upper floor; the brickwork is uniform here.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a plain red brick wall with a single small window on the lower level and no visible architectural accents.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Entryway not visible; likely minimalistic and flush with the facade, consistent with modern design
